## Type of change

- [ ] Spec / schema change (requires RFC)
- [ ] New regulatory profile
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Implementation (post-Phase-2 only)
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Constraints checklist

- [ ] No forbidden compliance-claiming phrasing (CONSTRAINTS.md §1)
- [ ] No secrets / customer data / internal addresses (CONSTRAINTS.md §2)
- [ ] If schema change: RFC linked + migration documented (CONSTRAINTS.md §3)
- [ ] If profile change: `disclaimer` and per-requirement `limitation` present
- [ ] `node scripts/verify-*.mjs` passes locally
